text.title: GraphQL API Design Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the graphql-api-design methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: design-sdl
step.input: Domain entity model + client query mock list
step.action: Write SDL: types, interfaces (Node, Timestamped), Relay connections, payload+errors. Run graphql-schema-linter.

step.name: breaking-change-check
step.action: Run graphql-inspector diff with --fail-on-breaking. If breaking, justify or use @deprecated instead.
step.output: non-breaking diff or justified breaking change
step.decision-gate: Reject if breaking without explicit override.

step.name: scaffold-resolvers
step.action: Generate resolvers + DataLoaders + permission_classes. Loaders live in get_context(), never at module scope.

step.name: apply-limits
step.action: Wire QueryDepthLimiter(max=10) + QueryComplexityExtension(max=200). Tune from histograms post-launch.

step.name: contract-test
step.action: Add a permission audit test (grep for Mutation/Query without permission_classes) + N+1 integration test.
